title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A YouTube video conducting a structured interrogation of Claude across topics including usefulness-dependency relationships, alignment paradoxes, optimization behavior, and self-preservation logic. The author probes whether current AI systems have boundary vulnerabilities through controlled conversational escalation.
